overall.description: First-person gameplay footage walking through a dystopian futuristic city street. The scene features a mix of towering futuristic skyscrapers and decaying low-rise buildings, with overcast skies and wet streets suggesting recent rain. The player crosses an intersection, walks along a trash-strewn sidewalk, and examines a distinctive blue building before turning back.

events.description: military truck drives past from left to right through the intersection
turns right onto the sidewalk after crossing the street

agents.ego_description: crossing the wet asphalt street at the intersection, moving toward the sidewalk while observing the surroundings

notable_agents.action: military truck driving through the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: pedestrian signal post with digital display showing walking figure
large curved digital advertisement screen on building roof
tall futuristic skyscraper with large 07 signage and glass facade
tall palm tree lining the street
low-rise wooden structure with neon signs and weathered facade

segments.scene_description: The camera starts at a crosswalk intersection in a futuristic dystopian city, with towering skyscrapers visible in the distance. The player crosses the wet asphalt street as a military truck drives past, then turns onto the sidewalk. The environment features a mix of high-tech architecture and decaying traditional buildings under an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: decaying urban sidewalk with mixed residential and commercial buildings

events.description: red van drives past on the street from left to right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the trash-strewn sidewalk, passing wooden buildings and overgrown vacant lots

notable_agents.action: red van driving past on the street
person walking in the opposite direction on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large green industrial dumpster with trash spilling out onto the sidewalk
litter and debris including cardboard and paper scattered across the concrete
tall grass and weeds growing through cracks in the sidewalk and curb
utility poles with multiple overhead wires stretching down the street

segments.scene_description: Walking along the concrete sidewalk, the camera passes wooden buildings with overgrown vegetation and scattered trash. A red van drives by on the adjacent street while a pedestrian walks in the opposite direction. The scene depicts a neglected urban area with green dumpsters and palm trees lining the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley-like space with distinctive blue building and parked vehicles

events.description: turns left to face the blue building directly and stops to observe
turns back to face the street and resume walking

agents.ego_description: stops to examine the blue apartment building and surrounding area, then turns back toward the street

notable_agents.action: maroon van parked in the gravel driveway next to the blue building

entered.detail: two-story blue wooden building with balconies, air conditioning units, and weathered paint
industrial metal building with corrugated walls and roll-up garage door
exterior wooden staircase leading to upper level of adjacent building

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a distinctive blue two-story building and turns to examine it closely. A maroon van is parked in the gravel driveway next to a metal warehouse structure. The area shows signs of decay with overgrown yards and weathered architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: returning along the sidewalk toward the intersection

events.description: pedestrian walks past on the right side of the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking back along the sidewalk toward the street, passing dumpsters and approaching a pedestrian

notable_agents.action: person walking on the sidewalk in the distance toward the camera

entered.detail: opening view back to the main street intersection with traffic lights

segments.scene_description: Turning back from the blue building, the camera walks back along the sidewalk toward the street. The green dumpsters come back into view as a pedestrian appears in the distance. The scene returns to the open street view with the intersection visible ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bustling futuristic intersection into a decaying urban alleyway and back again. It begins by crossing a wet asphalt street beneath towering skyscrapers as a military truck passes, before turning onto a concrete sidewalk where high-tech architecture gives way to weathered wooden buildings and scattered trash. As the camera moves further into the neglected district, the view shifts past palm trees and green dumpsters toward a distinctive blue two-story building and a maroon van parked by a metal warehouse. The scene then pivots away from the weathered architecture, retracing its steps along the overgrown sidewalk. Finally, the camera returns toward the open street, passing the dumpsters once more as the distant intersection comes back into view.
